mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE j.status = 'OPEN'
AND (j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND j.job_type = #{jobType}
SELECT j.*, c.name AS company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE j.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jobs (company_id, title, description, requirement, salary_range, location, job_type, deadline) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{requirement}, #{salaryRange}, #{location}, #{jobType}, #{deadline})
